name: Bug report

**Before filing:** please skim the README "Support" section and CONTRIBUTING.md —
a few limits (2-worker scaling plateau, unverified znver4/5, FLAC ≤24-bit) are
known and intentional.

```
SuperLAME.exe ...your exact command...
```
